name: Bubblegum Bucket
description: Notes Despite its status as a vanity item, this helm is actually quite useful. While it lacks the Berserk buff of most other helms, it has a speedy duration of 12 seconds. This is very useful if you do not have a high MHeal pet and can’t permanently activate tiered helmets.
effects: On self: Speedy for 12 seconds On self: Healing for 4 seconds
